prerequisites: No external account or credentials required. Hardcoded Records is a built-in source that emits a fixed set of records.
Optionally decide how many records to emit via the count config field.

authMethods.name: No authentication
authMethods.summary: This connector exposes no secret fields and requires no credentials. It emits hardcoded records locally and does not connect to any external API.

setupSteps.title: Configure the optional record count
setupSteps.body: Provide the optional count field to control how many hardcoded records the source emits. The field is not required; leave it unset to use the connector's default.

setupSteps.title: Run the source
setupSteps.body: No credentials are needed. Once the optional count is set, run the connector to emit the hardcoded records.
